channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large pothole next to drain grille, 2nd March
item.description:
Large pothole next to drain grille on near side, made worse when cars queue for roadworks on the next junction when heading towards Stoke Orchard from Bishops Cleeve. Pothole is near the bus stop.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Road, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge potholes impossible to avoid. Today child’s bike wheel lodged into hole., 1st March
item.description:
So dangerous. Crash imminent
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138a, Leckhampton Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large pothole close to pedestrian crossing, 1st March
item.description:
Very deep and large pothole on or near pedestrian crossing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Edinburgh Place, St Mark's, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on lane off Alstone Road, 1st March
item.description:
There is a gravel lane in between Gloucester Road and Alstone Avenue off Alstone Road. A large amount of rubbish has been dumped including high chairs, mattresses and household furniture. The rubbish has been growing over the past 6 months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 83, Gloucester Road, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple dangerous pothole, 1st March
item.description:
Whole stretch between coming off racecourse roundabout to roundabout at bottom of Tommy Taylor’s lane is littered with multiple large potholes and has been for at least 6 weeks. Has caused damage to my vehicle with gouge out of tyre wall, not alone dangerous driving with people swerving around them. Action plan for repairs isn’t soon enough. This is an embarrassment to Cheltenham, especially in the lead up to race week on one of the main roads to the racecourse. Action needs to be better and faster. Sort it out.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Swindon Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain grills in ditch blocked Greenway lane, 1st March
item.description:
The ditch on Greenway Lane is blocked with debris after contractors cut the hedges. Ditch has been full of water. Debris has been left, blocking the flow of rainwater and drain grills are blocked Photos taken opposite number 32 .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashley Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed bump, 1st March
item.description:
Large holes in speed bump between Arle gardens junction and railway bridge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 117, Arle Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The Gloscat traffic lights are turning red for no reason, 1st March
item.description:
Gloscat traffic lights on P E Way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Princess Elizabeth Way, Benhall, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Pothole in road, 1st March
item.description:
Pothole between 293 and 291 Gloucester Road, Cheltenham. Close to the junction of Gloucester Road and Lansdown Castle Drive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 338, Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 1st March
item.description:
Permanent traffic Light, Bulb has gone, single red light failed or bulb.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

As above, several potholes along this road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extensive litter, 1st March
item.description:
There is extensive litter in the verge along both sides of Brockhampton Lane from the corner of GE to the sewage treatment plant. Please can you organise a litter pick for this road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockhampton Lane, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive hole ruins my tyres, 1st March
item.description:
Please just fix this massive hole
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingscroft Road, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 1st March
item.description:
Just opposite gate to Lotts Meadow

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
